privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env research_vessel_expedition task by confirming that the starting GPredict configuration (including the 'PreviousCruise' QTH) is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected coordinates and altitude for 'Woods_Hole' and 'MidAtlantic' stations exactly match the prompt instructions. Also confirmed via real-world TLE data and web search that the specified NORAD IDs correctly map to the requested satellites (NOAA 15, 18, 19 and ISS, SO-50, AO-73).
